phases.name: Grade 1 Adventure Scale-up
phases.summary: Scaled Grade 1 into a 24-template deterministic adventure mission bank with data-driven UI, local progress, reward-to-next continuation, and quality gates.

phases.name: Grade 2 Adventure Alpha
phases.summary: Added a 36-template Grade 2 Alpha with unit-first flow, structured length/time inputs, Grade 2 visual models, local progress, validation, and tests.
